comment: Fetched-asset manifest consumed by scripts/fetch_assets.py. Each entry: url, sha256 (of the download), license (must be in the allowed set), license_url (page where the license was verified), author, destination (repo-relative), retrieved (YYYY-MM-DD), postprocess (list of documented steps, informational). Assets authored in-repo (e.g. editor/resources/icons/custom/) are NOT listed here — they appear only in ASSETS_LICENSES.md.
